scite.description: scite.ai retrieval-shape MCP — Story 27-2 provider target. Auth: HTTP Basic via SCITE_USER_NAME / SCITE_PASSWORD. Consumed at runtime by skills/bmad-agent-texas/scripts/retrieval/mcp_client.py (Python JSON-RPC-over-HTTP client).

consensus.description: Consensus.app retrieval-shape MCP — Story 27-2.5 provider target; cross-validation partner to scite. Auth: Bearer via CONSENSUS_API_KEY. Consumed at runtime by retrieval/mcp_client.py.
